title: MATAS v3.0 derived lemma and wordform frequencies

publication.scope: Frequency views derived reproducibly from every integer-ID MATAS v3.0 CoNLL-U token row except punctuation.
publication.access: Static JSON chunks with separate lemma/POS and wordform/POS views.

provenance.citation: Rimkutė, E., Bielinskienė, A., Dadurkevičius, V., Kovalevskaitė, J., Utka, A., Boizou, L. 2024. Lithuanian morphologically annotated corpus — MATAS v3.0. Institute of Digital Resources and Interdisciplinary Research (SITTI), Vytautas Magnus University. CLARIN-LT Repository. https://hdl.handle.net/20.500.11821/61.

constraints: Do not conflate this derived corpus frequency with the source's generic token total.
Exclude UPOS=PUNCT from both frequency views.
Preserve the Universal POS value; use UNSPECIFIED only where the source field is empty.
Keep lemma and wordform frequencies as separate views.

views.title: MATAS lemmas by Universal POS
views.description: Non-punctuation MATAS tokens aggregated by source lemma and Universal POS, ordered by descending count.

views.title: MATAS word forms by Universal POS
views.description: Non-punctuation MATAS tokens aggregated by source form and Universal POS, ordered by descending count.
